Container.Name: sw-downloader
Container.Overview: Automatically downloads the latest Stan Wyjatkowy Saturday stream from YouTube before the channel edits the VOD. Uses Playwright to detect the stream and yt-dlp to download it once finished.

Config.Name: Downloads
Config.Description: Where downloaded video files are saved.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Stores the state file and debug screenshots.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone used for all cron schedules. See https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones

Config.Name: Temp Directory
Config.Description: Where yt-dlp stores partial files during download. Default /tmp/sw-dl is RAM-backed (tmpfs) — fast and auto-cleaned. Override with a path on a fast disk if RAM is limited.

Config.Name: Generate NFO
Config.Description: Set to true to generate a Plex-compatible .nfo sidecar file next to each downloaded video (title, description, aired date, thumbnail).

Config.Name: Download Subtitles
Config.Description: Set to true to download Polish subtitles and embed them as an internal track in the MP4. Tries manual subs first, falls back to auto-generated.

Config.Name: Max Age (hours)
Config.Description: How many hours after upload a video is still considered the unedited stream.

Config.Name: Min Duration (minutes)
Config.Description: Minimum video length in minutes. Shorter videos are assumed to be already edited.

Config.Name: Show Year
Config.Description: Show premiere year included in the output filename.

Config.Name: Find Cron
Config.Description: Cron expression for the initial stream check. Default: Saturday 20:05.

Config.Name: Find Retry Cron
Config.Description: Cron expression for retrying the stream check if not found yet. Default: every 5 min Saturday evening.

Config.Name: Download Cron
Config.Description: Cron expression for how often to attempt the download. Default: every 30 minutes.

Config.Name: Run Now
Config.Description: Set to true to trigger the find+download pipeline immediately. Set back to false after testing.
